response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects senior/lead roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and willingness to start from foundational contributions.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops/talks
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but fluency is a hard requirement
Resume portrays senior/lead roles, not entry-level candidate behavior or mindset
Java experience is listed but not evidenced in project work — primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
